- update to 9.6.1
- remove DISTNAME/WRKSRC - they are default now
- add license
- add gnucap dependency (required for several games)
- move CPPFLAGS out of CONFIGURE_ENV
- remove stale reinplace
- remove *.bak files after patching
- remove not needed files/patch-src_gcompris_gameutil.c
- align files/patch-src_gcompris.c to new version
